text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, I'm out shopping with Agnes Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We got everything I wanted. Should we head
back with the bags?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Oh? What's that over there?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I see, a raffle.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That reminds we, we did in fact receive a raffle
ticket while shopping earlier.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What are the chances? Trainer, why don't you
test your luck?
choice_data_list: You don't want to give it a go?
You don't want to give it a go?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Not entirely. I'd rather observe, myself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
When the ball rolls out from the tumbler, I
wonder how its color will affect your emotional
response.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now that you know what I want, it's time to get to
it. Show me the relationship between emotional
responses and the mimetic muscles.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give in to her pressure and head toward the
raffle booth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I crank the tumbler, and what pops out is...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: And just like that... the grand-prize!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh, aren't you lucky!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Your facial muscles were at first taut with
anticipation but then quickly eased into the
telltale signs of a gleeful grin!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What a fascinating sight to behold!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: But to win a hot spring trip, of all things... hmm.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Yes. You should keep it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Why? you ask. Nowadays, with technology such
as virtual tours, one no longer needs to leave the
house if their intent is to travel.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing but trouble having to trek all the way
to some distant location. Wouldn't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You keep the ticket. Invite a friend to go with
you or something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well, she certainly won't be taking it back. I
agree to hold onto it for now.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh! This is great!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Fresh carrot served on top of a scrumptiously
succulent hamburger steak...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: If I incorporate it into this, no Umamusume would be able to resist! Heh-heh-heh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh, nothing in particular, just talking to myself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let's hurry back, Trainer! Make sure you carry the
food with utmost caution!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have an unsettling feeling she's up to no good.
Nevertheless, I bring the deluxe carrot hamburger
steak back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Wow, that's not bad at all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This will go along well with the other items we
purchased today.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As long as it looks like a carrot, I'll be able to lure
a few Umamusume in... Heh-heh.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh, nothing in particular, just talking to myself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Let's hurry on back, Trainer. I suddenly have a
pressing matter to attend to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have an unsettling feeling she's up to no good.
Nevertheless, I bring the bushel of carrots back to
the academy.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh... Nice, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The sight of you, surrounded by a throng of
onlookers, with a single carrot in hand...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Like a guinea pig that's just gotten its
paws on its feed!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Goodness me, how spectacular! Keep at it, my
dear subservient guinea pig!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Harboring confused feelings, I quickly stuff the
carrot into the shopping bag.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh... That was interesting to observe.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Your face was at first brimming with expectation,
then quickly faded into disappointment!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A terribly pure and honest reaction. It's amazing
how much the face can convey.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
With that being said, it's kind of a shame you
basically lost.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess I'll accept the pack of tissues. It
might come in handy when someone next spills
something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a sullen mood, I head back to the academy
with Agnes Tachyon.
